\n

I am an AI/ML developer specializing in agentic workflows and local-first LLM architectures. My focus is on moving complex reasoning pipelines from cloud dependencies to optimized, edge-capable deployments.

\n

I architect systems where autonomous agents communicate, verify, and execute multi-step logic—specifically utilizing tools like LangGraph, FAISS, and Pydantic. From clinical decision-support to localized virtual companions, I build systems that prioritize privacy, zero-cloud-cost inference, and scalable RAG frameworks.
